description: Part 6 - Master EA (Main Entry Point with OnInit/OnTick). Creates the master .mq5 file that #includes all 5 parts and implements the OnInit/OnTick/OnDeinit callbacks. This is the file loaded into MT5 that orchestrates the complete system: initializes all engines, runs them in correct order on each new bar, and coordinates execution. Also includes the OnInit setup of all indicator handles and chart objects.
steps: Add the master property header with EA description, version, and copyright
Add #include directives for all 5 parts (using relative paths since they are in the same directory)

Implement OnInit(): Initialize all series buffers (RefreshSeries), create all ATR/indicator handles for the 6 fixed timeframes, initialize phase engine state to zero, initialize curve tree (empty), initialize time intelligence cycle tracking, initialize belief engine EMA states, set up chart objects (destination lines, level markers), print startup message with all engine versions

Implement OnTick() with the correct execution order: 1) RefreshSeries, 2) IsNewBar guard, 3) UpdatePhaseEngine (Part 1), 4) UpdateARC (Part 1), 5) UpdateMTFStructure - run f_se_compute on all 6 timeframes (Part 2), 6) UpdateFractalStack (Part 2), 7) UpdatePhysicsObservation (Part 3), 8) UpdateEnergyFramework - EDE/RE/EAE (Part 3), 9) UpdateBeliefEngine (Part 3), 10) UpdateHypothesisEngine (Part 3), 11) UpdatePredictionEngine (Part 3), 12) UpdateSenseei (Part 3), 13) UpdateLiquidationWave (Part 3), 14) UpdateCurveObject (Part 4), 15) UpdateCurveTree (Part 4), 16) UpdateCampaign (Part 4), 17) UpdateTimeIntelligence (Part 4), 18) ManageArcInstitutionalExits (Part 4 exit logic), 19) ExecuteTrading (Part 4 entry logic), 20) UpdateDashboards (Part 5)
Implement OnDeinit(): Clean up all chart objects (ObjectsDeleteAll for the EA's prefix), delete indicator handles, print shutdown message
Add a unique object name prefix (e.g. 'MASTER_') to all chart objects so OnDeinit can clean them without affecting other indicators
Add alert conditions: AlertOnAttack (when Senseei flips to ATTACK), AlertOnCurveDeath (life < 33), AlertOnStackFlip (fractalStackDir changes), AlertOnObjectiveArrival (liqg_objArrival fires)

Ensure the execution order respects data dependencies: phase engine first (provides phases for intelligence), MTF structure second (provides fractal stack), intelligence engines third (provide gates for execution), execution last (uses all gates)
acceptance_criteria: All 5 part files are included via #include
OnInit properly initializes all subsystems and returns INIT_SUCCEEDED
OnTick executes all 20 update steps in correct dependency order
Alert conditions fire on key state transitions
The file compiles as the entry point that orchestrates the entire system
verification: Read the output file and verify #include paths reference all 5 parts
Verify OnTick execution order respects data dependencies
Check that OnInit creates handles and OnDeinit releases them
